subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 534174346/171205573 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (USRA) and A. von Kienlin (MPE) report on behalf of the 
Fermi GBM Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 534174346/171205573 at
13:45:41.81 UT on 05 December 2017, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particle activity."
